meta.title: Support
meta.description: Get help with Uha, report issues, and find the right contact path for support, billing, data, and security questions.

page.title: Support
page.intro: For Uha support, bug reports, billing questions, or feedback, email me directly. I read support mail myself and try to keep replies practical.
page.include_intro: A clear report helps me reproduce the issue faster. When relevant, include:
page.include_device: Your iPhone model, iOS version, and Uha version.
page.include_steps: The steps you took before the problem appeared.
page.include_screenshots: Screenshots or screen recordings if they do not expose private subscription data.
page.include_purchase: For purchase or TestFlight issues, mention whether you installed from TestFlight or the App Store.
page.beta_body: Uha is currently in public beta through Apple TestFlight. TestFlight purchases are for testing only. Real purchases are handled by Apple In-App Purchase after App Store release, and Apple manages refunds, payment methods, and regional billing rules.
page.data_body: Uha stores your subscription library on your device. I cannot see, edit, or recover your local data from the server side. If you use iCloud backup, that data is stored in your personal iCloud account and managed by Apple.
page.security_body: For suspected security issues, include the affected URL or app area, reproduction steps, and impact. Please avoid sending private subscription lists, payment details, or credentials in email.
